title: Build, flash, and smoke-test R1 firmware on hardware
description: Why this exists: firmware is not complete until the actual device boots and proves the board path. What needs to be done: document flashing path, build firmware for the exact R1 target, flash the device, capture boot logs, and verify board identity, LICHEN_L2 enabled, LoRa configured, BLE advertising, and no fatal init failures. Acceptance criteria: reproducible build and flash commands exist; hardware boot logs are recorded in Beads notes; failures create blocker Beads with exact logs; three independent codereview subagents run after code changes and findings are recorded.
